ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "discord" TEXT /* Discord username and tag */,
  "years_playing" INTEGER /* Number of years playing the game */,
  "createdAt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the community is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the community */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the community */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the community was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the community was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the community (public or private) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community membership */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "community_id" TEXT /* ID of the community */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the community (e.g., member, leader) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the community */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is banned from the community */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for banning the user */,
  "is_moderator" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is a moderator in the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_members_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game session */,
  "community_id" TEXT /* ID of the community the session belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the session */,
  "min_participants" INTEGER /* Minimum number of participants required for the session */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the session is private or public */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session (e.g., online, offline, specific server) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the session */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user left the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user in the session (e.g., joined, left, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekdays" (
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekday */,
  "weekday_name" TEXT /* Name of the weekday (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the weekday is a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_weekdays" (
  "session_weekday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session weekday */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weekday */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session weekday was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_weekday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_weekdays_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_weekdays_weekday_id FOREIGN KEY ("weekday_id") REFERENCES weekdays ("weekday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_channels" (
  "voice_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice channel */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the voice channel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the voice channel was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the voice channel is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voice_channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_channels_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., session start, session end) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user setting */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
